source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Determine the area of the quadrilateral PQRS pictured on the right, where $\mathrm{PS}=\mathrm{RS}$, $\angle \mathrm{PSR}=\angle \mathrm{PQR}=90^{\circ}, \mathrm{ST} \perp \mathrm{PQ}$, and $\mathrm{ST}=5$.
<image1>

solving likely requires combining diagram interpretation with geometric reasoning rather than a single direct lookup

verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is '25', which is easy to compare against a solver output
